title: Source
description: A source record (document, oral history, media). ID comes from the map key in the parent structure.

type.description: Source type from vocabulary (validated against source_types vocabulary)

authors.description: Author(s) or creator(s) of the source

date.description: Publication date or date range covered by the source

description.description: Detailed description of the source content and scope

repository.description: Reference to Repository where source is held

properties.description: Vocabulary-defined properties (abbreviation, call_number, events_recorded, agency, coverage, external_ids, publication_info)
